summary: VenuLoQ Mobile Header Logged-in Experience - ALL TESTS PASSED. Tested mobile header states on LandingPage and VenueSearchPage. Key features verified: Welcome message when logged in, Sign In button when not logged in, hamburger menu with user info/Profile/Sign Out when logged in, Get Started button when not logged in, Favourites tab on both landing and search pages when user has favorites, Sign Out functionality.

tests.test: Sign In button visible (data-testid=mobile-signin-btn)
Welcome message NOT visible (data-testid=mobile-welcome-landing)
Hamburger menu shows 'Get Started' button
Hamburger menu does NOT show 'Sign Out'
Welcome message shows 'Welcome, Demo' (data-testid=mobile-welcome-landing)
Sign In button NOT visible when logged in
Hamburger menu shows user info (name and email)
Hamburger menu shows 'My Favourites' link
Hamburger menu shows 'My Enquiries' link
Hamburger menu shows 'Profile' link
Hamburger menu shows 'Sign Out' link
Hamburger menu does NOT show 'Get Started'
Sign In button visible when NOT logged in (data-testid=mobile-signin-btn)
User avatar visible when logged in (data-testid=mobile-user-avatar)
Sign In button NOT visible when logged in
Favourites tab NOT visible when NOT logged in
Favourites tab visible on search page when logged in with favorites (data-testid=mobile-favorites-tab)
Clicking search page Favourites tab navigates to /favorites
Favourites tab visible on landing page when logged in with favorites (data-testid=landing-favorites-tab)
Clicking landing page Favourites tab navigates to /favorites
Sign Out button clickable in landing page menu
After Sign Out, Sign In button appears
After Sign Out, Welcome message disappears
Shared Header.js mobile-welcome shows 'Welcome, Demo' (data-testid=mobile-welcome)

seed_data_creation: Test favorites created and cleaned up during testing via /api/favorites endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile header logged-in experience fully tested. Key data-testids verified: mobile-welcome-landing (LandingPage logged in), mobile-signin-btn (LandingPage not logged in), mobile-menu-toggle (LandingPage hamburger), landing-favorites-tab (LandingPage favorites), landing-favorites-section (LandingPage favorites container), mobile-user-avatar (VenueSearchPage logged in), mobile-favorites-tab (VenueSearchPage favorites), mobile-welcome (shared Header.js). The splash screen on landing page takes ~5-6 seconds. Auth flow: POST /api/auth/login returns token, set in localStorage as 'token' and 'user', then reload page. Favorites API: GET/POST/DELETE /api/favorites.
